nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers. Cloudy, with a low around 62. South wind around 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws.name: Monday
nws.detailedForecast: Rain showers likely before 5pm, then showers and thunderstorms likely. Some of the storms could produce heavy rain. Cloudy, with a high near 71. Southeast wind 6 to 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

nws.name: Monday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms. Some of the storms could produce heavy rain. Cloudy, with a low around 59. East wind 9 to 14 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New rainfall amounts between 1 and 2 inches possible.

nws.name: Tuesday
nws.detailedForecast: Rain showers. Cloudy, with a high near 67. Northeast wind around 15 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New rainfall amounts between a half and three quarters of an inch possible.

nws.name: Tuesday Night
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 58. Northeast wind 7 to 13 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%.

nws.name: Wednesday
nws.shortForecast: Slight Chance Rain Showers then Mostly Sunny
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers before 7am. Mostly sunny, with a high near 78. Northeast wind around 7 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws.name: Wednesday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly clear, with a low around 65. South wind around 6 mph.

nws.name: Thursday

nws.name: Sunday
